title: Message Call Transaction Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of a message call transaction, initiated by an Externally Owned Account (EOA), being executed on the Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM) to interact with a smart contract.
relationships: EOA signs and broadcasts a transaction
Network validates & includes transaction in a block
EVM decodes transaction data and executes call
EVM runs contract code at target address
Code execution updates contract state (if applicable)
Result & logs are returned (state changes are committed)
